attributes.text: Your answer controls how your profile shows up in filtered results. Check all that apply.

error.debugMessage:
Assertion '"What should your profile show?" is visible' failed. Check the UI hierarchy in debug artifacts to verify the element state and properties.

Possible causes:
- Element selector may be incorrect - check if there are similar elements with slightly different names/properties.
- Element may be temporarily unavailable due to loading state
- This could be a real regression that needs to be addressed
